name: Paleo Resources, Inc.
summary: Paleo Resources, Inc., an oil and gas, and mineral exploration company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of the oil and gas and precious and base metal properties in Canada and the United States. It holds a 50% interest in the Joffre D-3 B Oil Pool located in Alberta; and a 100% interest in the Burchell Lake property covering an area of 5,900 hectares located in the Shebandowan gold camp in Ontario. The company's Burchell Lake Property is prospective for gold, copper, and molybdenum minerals. It also develops and produces oil and gas assets in Polk and Tyler counties, Texas. The company was formerly known as Tanager Energy Inc. and changed its name to Paleo Resources, Inc. in April 2019. Paleo Resources, Inc. was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in San Antonio, Texas.
